title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repository: get up and running with Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, list and delete models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node, Bun, Deno and modern browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package that wraps Ollama models for chains, agents, retrieval and tool calling.

title: ollama-webui (formerly Ollama-WebUI)
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI for any Ollama model; markdown, code highlighting, multi-user, uploads, RAG.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based interactive CLI that wraps the Ollama REST API with syntax highlighting and chat history.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental GitHub Copilot-like server that uses Ollama models for in-editor code completion.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and horizontal scaling.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Lightweight React/Electron desktop GUI for chatting with local Ollama models.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with builders, streaming, and Spring Boot starters.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama; simple interface to chat, generate and manage models.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing async/await bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Official C# .NET client for Ollama with async enumerables and nullable reference types.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in NLP pipelines.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that brings local LLM power to any server using Ollama.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix flake providing reproducible builds of Ollama and pre-packaged models for NixOS.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama containers in CI pipelines for testing LLM-powered features.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Collection of ready-made docker-compose stacks pairing Ollama with Open-WebUI, LibreChat, Flowise and more.

title: ollama-model-hub
summary: Community-curated list of custom Modelfiles and quantized GGUFs ready to pull into Ollama.

title: ollama-rag-chatbot
summary: Minimal Streamlit app showing how to build a RAG chatbot backed by Ollama and ChromaDB.
